# TwoFactorAuthentication

The user needs to enter the code generated by the Authenticator App used to setup 2FA or received by SMS.

## Properties

Name | Type | Description | Notes
------------ | ------------- | ------------- | -------------
**type** | **str** |  | 
**platform** | **str** | The platform of the 2FA.           - &#x60;SMS&#x60; means the code was sent in a SMS.           - &#x60;APP&#x60; means the user must enter the code generated by the Authenticator App used to setup 2FA.           - &#x60;WHATSAPP&#x60; means the code was sent via WhatsApp. |
